nasb.text: When He approached Bethphage and Bethany, near the mount that is called Olivet, He sent two of the disciples,

esv.text: When he drew near to Bethphage and Bethany, at the mount that is called Olivet, he sent two of the disciples,

cnv.text: 將到伯法其和伯大尼，就在橄欖山那裡，他差派兩個門徒，

ccb.text: 快到橄榄山附近的伯法其和伯大尼时，耶稣派了两个门徒，说：

csbs.text: 快到伯法其和伯大尼，那叫做“橄榄园”的山，耶稣派了两个门徒，
